basic_details.job_title: ECHS Jalandhar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 28 Safaiwala, Pharmacist and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme Jalandhar (ECHS Jalandhar)
basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme Jalandhar (ECHS Jalandhar) has officially announced the Various Medical and Paramedical Posts Recruitment 2026 with 28 openings. The detailed notification was published on 02-07-2026 at the official website www.echs.gov.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria (as per notification) and hold qualifications such as Graduate with 5 years experience, MD/MS or MBBS with 5 years experience, GNM Diploma Class-I Nursing Assistant Course, B.Sc. Medical Lab Tech or DMLT, B Pharmacy or Diploma in Pharmacy, Diploma Class-I Radiographer Course, Literate with 5 years

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with 5 years experience, MD/MS or MBBS with 5 years experience, GNM Diploma Class-I Nursing Assistant Course, B.Sc. Medical Lab Tech or DMLT, B Pharmacy or Diploma in Pharmacy, Diploma Class-I Radiographer Course, Literate with 5 years experience, 10th Class with 5 years experience, BDS with 5 years experience, Diploma Class-I Dental Hygienist Course
qualification.details: OIC Polyclinic (Jalandhar) and Outstation: Graduate, Minimum 05 years experience in Health Care Institution or equivalent position (ESM only) Medical Specialist (Physician, Unit): MD/MS in Specialist concerned OR MBBS with 05 years experience in the subject concerned after PG Nursing Assistant (Jalandhar): GNM Diploma Class-I Nursing Assistant Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 05 years work experience Lab Tech (Jalandhar and Outstation): B.Sc. (Medical Lab Tech) or 10+2 with science and DMLT, Minimum 05 years experience Pharmacist (Jalandhar, Hoshiarpur and Gurdaspur): B Pharmacy from a recognized institute OR 10+2 with Science (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) and Approved Diploma in Pharmacy and registered as Pharmacist under Pharmacy Act 1948, Minimum 05 years experience Radiographer (Jalandhar): Diploma Class-I Radiographer Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 05 years work experience Female Attendant (Jalandhar): Literate, Minimum 05 years experience in Civil/Army Health Institution Chowkidar (Jalandhar): Literate, Minimum 05 years experience Driver (Jalandhar): 10th Class, Minimum 05 years experience Peon (Jalandhar): Literate, Minimum 05 years experience Female Sweeper (Jalandhar): Literate, Minimum 05 years experience Safaiwala (Jalandhar): Literate, Minimum 05 years experience Dental Officer (Jalandhar and Outstation): BDS, Minimum 05 years experience Dental Assistant/Hygienist (Jalandhar and Outstation): Diploma Class-I Dental Hygienist Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 05 years experience

vacancy_details.Post Name: Medical Officer (Jalandhar, Hoshiarpur, Una, Suranassi, Suranasel Nawanshahr and Gagret)

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Medical Officer (Jalandhar, Hoshiarpur, Una, Suranassi, Suranasel Nawanshahr and Gagret)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Jalandhar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ECHS Jalandhar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: OIC Polyclinic (Jalandhar) and Outstation: Graduate, Minimum 05 years experience in Health Care Institution or equivalent position (ESM only) Medical Specialist (Physician, Unit): MD/MS in Specialist concerned OR MBBS with 05 years experience in the subject concerned after PG Nursing Assistant (Jalandhar): GNM Diploma Class-I Nursing Assistant Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 05 years work experience Lab Tech (Jalandhar and Outstation): B.Sc. (Medical Lab Tech) or 10+2 with science and DMLT, Minimum 05 years experience Pharmacist (Jalandhar, Hoshiarpur and Gurdaspur): B Pharmacy from a recognized institute OR 10+2 with Science (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) and Approved Diploma in Pharmacy and registered as Pharmacist under Pharmacy Act 1948, Minimum 05 years experience Radiographer (Jalandhar): Diploma Class-I Radiographer Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 05 years work experience Female Attendant (Jalandhar): Literate, Minimum 05 years experience in Civil/Army Health Institution Chowkidar (Jalandhar): Literate, Minimum 05 years experience Driver (Jalandhar): 10th Class, Minimum 05 years experience Peon (Jalandhar): Literate, Minimum 05 years experience Female Sweeper (Jalandhar): Literate, Minimum 05 years experience Safaiwala (Jalandhar): Literate, Minimum 05 years experience Dental Officer (Jalandhar and Outstation): BDS, Minimum 05 years experience Dental Assistant/Hygienist (Jalandhar and Outstation): Diploma Class-I Dental Hygienist Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 05 years experience

rows.event: Last date of receipt of application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Jalandhar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Jalandhar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 26th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in ECHS Jalandhar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 28 vacancies are available for various Medical and Paramedical Posts in ECHS Jalandhar Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ECHS Jalandhar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their applications to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the posts in ECHS Jalandhar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 16,500/- to Rs. 1,30,000/- per month, depending on the post and qualifications.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any application fees for ECHS Jalandhar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for ECHS Jalandhar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Merit List and an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What are the minimum qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualifications vary by post, ranging from Literate with 5 years of experience to MD/MS or MBBS with 5 years of experience, and specific diplomas and degrees.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the ECHS Jalandhar Recruitment 2026 is for contractual positions.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for ECHS Jalandhar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of ECHS?
faq.answer: The official website of Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme is www.echs.gov.in.
